description_long: This is a double grave monument constructed from polished dark granite, featuring two upright headstones with gently curved tops. At the center, a prominent Latin cross rises above the headstones, serving as a central decorative and symbolic element. The grave is set on a broad, rectangular base with a slightly raised platform, giving it a solid and dignified appearance. The surface is smooth and reflective, typical of high-quality granite, and the edges are sharply defined. There are no visible inscriptions or engravings on the headstones or the cross. The overall design is solemn and formal, suitable for a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A double grave monument of polished dark granite with two headstones and a central Latin cross, set on a broad, raised base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both headstones, the central cross, and the full width of the raised base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the base and the upright headstones with the cross extending above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the headstones and the cross, with the base's depth visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the monument and the cross's extension above the headstones.
